notes: Prominent monk and abbot in Constantinople, associated with the heresy of Eutychianism (Monophysitism).

docs.title: Letter 28
docs.author: Pope Leo the Great

docs.excerpt: … priestly office, is in fact profoundly reckless and staggeringly ignorant -- so much so that the prophet's words apply to him: "He refused to understand, so as to do good; he plots wickedness on his bed" (Psalm 36:3-4).
